posts.value_post:
Most landlords have no idea what their actual ROI is.

They know rent comes in. They know expenses go out. But ask them their cap rate, cash-on-cash return, or vacancy cost — blank stare.

You can't grow a portfolio you can't measure.

Track every property. Every dollar. Every tenant. Know your numbers.

thread_post: I built a Notion template for real estate investors who are tired of messy spreadsheets. Here's what's inside 🧵👇

The Portfolio Dashboard

One page shows everything:
- Total property value & equity
- Monthly cash flow (all properties combined)
- Occupancy rate
- Open maintenance requests
- Upcoming lease expirations

No more logging into 5 different apps.

Income & Expense Tracking

Every dollar is categorized:
- Rent, Airbnb bookings, deposits (income)
- Mortgage, insurance, repairs, taxes (expenses)
- Tax deduction tagger built in

Tax season goes from 2 weeks to 2 hours.

ROI Analysis (the part most landlords skip)

Built-in formulas calculate:
- Cap Rate
- Cash-on-Cash Return
- Net Operating Income
- Monthly Cash Flow per property
- Vacancy cost (lost income tracker)

Know exactly which properties are winners and which are dragging you down.

8 databases. 24 views. All connected.

Works on free Notion. $19.

Link in bio 🏠
